input.command: chmod +x /workspace/forge.py && mkdir -p /tmp/forge_test && python forge.py --data-dir /tmp/forge_test blueprint list
input.description: Test blueprint list with empty data
Create second blueprint for delete testing
Test validation error for empty name and requirement sets
